prerequisites.value: Cha 13, Bluff 3 ranks, Sense Motive 1 rank.

description.value: **Benefit:** As a standard action, you can attempt a Bluff check to aid another’s Disguise check. In addition, when attempting such a check to aid a vigilante ally in maintaining that ally’s social identity, a successful check grants that ally a +5 bonus instead of the normal +2.
